repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90223 on the existing contributor branch by resolving Copilot's two actionable review comments in the QQ Bot symlinked media helper test.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: repair qqbot symlink capability gate
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves

Repairs #90223 so the QQ Bot symlinked media helper test skips based on actual file symlink capability instead of platform assumptions, while preserving the contributor's original test robustness improvement.

## Why This Change Was Made

Copilot flagged that the skip gate should use the capability result on all platforms and that synchronous probe work should be avoided when it is not needed. The repair should keep the patch test-only and scoped to `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/file-utils.test.ts`.

## User Impact

No runtime behavior change. This only makes QQ Bot test coverage reliable across Windows, restricted containers, and normal Unix environments.

## Evidence

Planned validation: `pnpm test extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/file-utils.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`. Source PR credit: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90223 by @aniruddhaadak80.
credit_notes: Repair the existing contributor PR #90223 rather than replacing it; preserve credit for @aniruddhaadak80 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90223.
Address Copilot's review comments before requesting fresh review/merge preflight.
